data.title: Aon Welcomes Admiral James Stavridis to Expanded Board
data.description:
An update from Aon (AON) is now available.

Aon plc expanded its Board of Directors to 13 members, welcoming Admiral James Stavridis as a new director, effective August 15, 2024. With an extensive background that includes a distinguished military career, leadership at NATO, and academic tenure as a dean, Admiral Stavridis also brings valuable experience from his current role at a global investment firm and past board positions at various companies. He will serve on the Finance Committee and is set to be re-elected at the 2025 annual general meeting, with compensation aligned with company practices and an indemnity agreement in place.

For an in-depth examination of AON stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Dalata Hotel Group Reports Slight Shareholding Change
data.description:
Dalata Hotel (GB:DAL) has released an update.

Dalata Hotel Group PLC has announced a change in their major holdings, with FMR LLC now holding 7.99% of the voting rights as of 08th August 2024. This notification follows the regulatory guidelines and reflects a slight decrease from the previous notification, where FMR LLC held 8.00% of the voting rights.

For further insights into GB:DAL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Major Holdings Ltd. AGM Concludes with Full Approval
data.description:
Major Holdings Ltd. (HK:1389) has released an update.

Major Holdings Ltd. announces unanimous shareholder approval for all proposed resolutions at its Annual General Meeting on August 9, 2024. Shareholders voted in favor of key decisions including the re-election of directors, the appointment of auditors, and the authorization for the Board to allot shares and repurchase shares up to specified limits. The high level of consensus, with 100% voting support for each resolution, underscores shareholder confidence in the company’s governance and strategic direction.

For further insights into HK:1389 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Future FinTech Announces Leadership Change and New CEO Appointment
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Future FinTech Group (FTFT).

Future FinTech Group, Inc. has announced a change in leadership as Mr. Shanchun Huang resigned from his roles as a director and CEO on August 5, 2024, citing no disagreements with the company. He is succeeded by Mr. Hu Li, who brings experience from various financial roles, including as a director at FTFT International Securities and Futures Limited and Shineco, Inc. Mr. Li’s employment agreement with Future FinTech includes a three-year term with a monthly pre-tax salary of $7,000 and was not influenced by prior arrangements or family connections within the company.

For a thorough assessment of FTFT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mammoth Energy Services Unveils New Investor Presentation
data.description:
The latest update is out from Mammoth Energy Services (TUSK).

Mammoth Energy has updated its “investors” section at www.mammothenergy.com with a new investor presentation on August 9, 2024. This online resource is a hub for the latest company announcements and news. While this information is informative for stakeholders, it’s not officially filed for regulatory purposes nor is it part of the formal financial documents that might be included in official registration statements.

data.title: Yincheng Announces Director Role Shift
data.description:
Yincheng International Holding Co., Ltd. (HK:1902) has released an update.

Yincheng International Holding Co., Ltd. has announced the re-designation of Mr. Zhu Li from an executive Director to a non-executive Director, effective from 9 August 2024. Mr. Zhu will continue as vice president, focusing on strategic company development rather than daily operations. He holds an EMBA and has over 27 years of experience in the real estate industry, as well as a 2.50% share in the company through Silver Li Holding Limited.

For further insights into HK:1902 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Linmon Media Forecasts H1 2024 Net Loss
data.description:
Linmon Media Limited (HK:9857) has released an update.

Linmon Media Limited has issued a profit warning, anticipating a net loss of RMB 50-55 million for the first half of 2024, a stark contrast to the net profit of RMB 131 million in the same period the previous year. The expected loss is due to the delay in broadcasting a key drama series, originally scheduled for the first half of the year, leading to postponed revenue and profit recognition. Despite these results, the company assures shareholders of its stable financial position and ample cash flow.

For further insights into HK:9857 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks HongKong Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: POSCO Announces Bond Exchange Price Adjustment
data.description:
POSCO (PKX) has released an update.

POSCO Holdings Inc. has announced adjustments to the exchange price of its foreign currency denominated exchangeable bonds following a recent cash dividend. The adjustment has led to a revised post-adjustment price and an increase in the number of shares available for conversion, exercise, and exchange. The effective date for the adjusted prices is set for July 1, 2024.

For further insights into PKX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Slater Investments Crosses 20% Voting Rights in Venture Life
data.description:
Venture Life (GB:VLG) has released an update.

Venture Life Group PLC has experienced a significant change in share ownership, with Slater Investments now holding over 20% of the company’s voting rights following a recent acquisition. This threshold was crossed on August 8, 2024, with the company being notified the following day. The total number of voting rights held by Slater Investments in Venture Life now stands at 25,381,431.

For further insights into GB:VLG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Longfor Group Boasts Strong Sales and Income
data.description:
Longfor Group Holdings (HK:0960) has released an update.

Longfor Group Holdings Limited reported an impressive aggregated contracted sales of RMB58.63 billion by the end of July 2024, with a total of 4.25 million square meters in sales area. In the same month, the company saw RMB7.51 billion in contracted sales, attributing RMB5.25 billion of that to company shareholders. The Group also announced a significant recurring income amounting to RMB15.40 billion, with a caution that these unaudited figures are preliminary and subject to change.

For further insights into HK:0960 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
